name: richer_experiment_worse_restricted_policy
success_criterion: E2 Blackwell-dominates E1; unrestricted E2 risk is no larger; registered E2 risk is strictly larger

name: exact_policy_collapse
success_criterion: action divergence is zero and fixed-policy risks are exactly equal

name: weak_global_rank_low_regret
success_criterion: selected action is epsilon-near-optimal while absolute Spearman is below 0.4

name: high_topk_poor_regret
success_criterion: top4 localization is one while selected regret is at least 0.75

name: positive_mean_adverse_tail
success_criterion: policy improves mean and 9/10 groups but has worse worst-group risk and worse CVaR for a protocol-derived alpha interval

name: dense_near_tie_action_set
success_criterion: near-optimal count is 5 and both effective-size summaries exceed 3

name: sparse_large_gap_action_set
success_criterion: near-optimal count is 1 and both effective-size summaries are below 1.01

name: partial_identification_minimax_regret
success_criterion: identified-set diameter is positive and the finite LP returns a feasible minimax rule

name: passive_vs_active_full_information_labels
success_criterion: report design-weighted estimands and distinguish full-information queries from one-arm pulls; no universal active advantage required

name: information_dominance_policy_approximation_reversal
success_criterion: rich Blackwell-dominates coarse, rich unrestricted risk is lower, and rich registered-policy risk exceeds coarse registered-policy risk with positive approximation gap
